$comment_unverified: These ids are UNVERIFIED guesses — bedrock/vertex/copilot are not authed on the machine where this template was written. Confirm each against `pi --list-models` on the work machine and correct as needed. The bedrock opus id (global.anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1) matches the existing BEDROCK_MODEL_MAP in extensions/subagent/index.ts, so it is the most trustworthy entry; the gemini and copilot ids are least verified.
